mapper.sql: project_id AS "projectId",name,role,summary,tech_stack AS "techStack",project_period AS "projectPeriod",team_size AS "teamSize",project_type AS "projectType",business_domain AS "businessDomain",project_status AS "projectStatus",background,responsibilities,highlights,challenges,outcomes,enabled,created_at AS "createdAt",updated_at AS "updatedAt"
material_id AS "materialId",project_id AS "projectId",file_name AS "fileName",content_type AS "contentType",storage_path AS "storagePath",size_bytes AS "sizeBytes",sha256,created_at AS "createdAt"
mapper.select: SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_deep_dive_material m WHERE m.project_id=p.project_id) AS "materialCount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_deep_dive_question q WHERE q.project_id=p.project_id) AS "questionCount" FROM project_deep_dive_project p WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND enabled=TRUE ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT FROM project_deep_dive_project WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND project_id=#{projectId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_deep_dive_project WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND project_id=#{projectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE project_deep_dive_project SET name=#{name},role=#{role},summary=#{summary},tech_stack=#{techStack},project_period=#{projectPeriod},team_size=#{teamSize},project_type=#{projectType},business_domain=#{businessDomain},project_status=#{projectStatus},background=#{background},responsibilities=#{responsibilities},highlights=#{highlights},challenges=#{challenges},outcomes=#{outcomes},enabled=TRUE,updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND project_id=#{projectId}
UPDATE project_deep_dive_project SET enabled=FALSE,updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND project_id=#{projectId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM project_deep_dive_material m USING project_deep_dive_project p WHERE m.project_id=p.project_id AND p.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND p.user_id=#{userId} AND m.material_id=#{materialId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM project_deep_dive_material m WHERE m.material_id=#{materialId} AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM project_deep_dive_project p WHERE p.project_id=m.project_id AND p.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND p.user_id=#{userId})

SELECT FROM project_deep_dive_material m WHERE m.project_id=#{projectId} AND m.sha256=#{sha256} AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM project_deep_dive_project p WHERE p.project_id=m.project_id AND p.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND p.user_id=#{userId})

SELECT FROM project_deep_dive_material m WHERE m.project_id=#{projectId} AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM project_deep_dive_project p WHERE p.project_id=m.project_id AND p.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND p.user_id=#{userId}) ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM project_deep_dive_question q USING project_deep_dive_project p WHERE q.project_id=p.project_id AND p.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND p.user_id=#{userId} AND q.project_id=#{projectId} AND COALESCE(q.source,'generated') <> 'manual'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM project_deep_dive_question q WHERE q.question_id=#{questionId} AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM project_deep_dive_project p WHERE p.project_id=q.project_id AND p.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND p.user_id=#{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE project_deep_dive_question q SET question=#{question},answer=#{answer},category=#{category},difficulty=#{difficulty},source=#{source} FROM project_deep_dive_project p WHERE q.project_id=p.project_id AND p.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND p.user_id=#{userId} AND q.question_id=#{questionId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM project_deep_dive_question q USING project_deep_dive_project p WHERE q.project_id=p.project_id AND p.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND p.user_id=#{userId} AND q.question_id=#{questionId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM project_deep_dive_question q WHERE q.project_id=#{projectId} AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM project_deep_dive_project p WHERE p.project_id=q.project_id AND p.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND p.user_id=#{userId}) ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE project_deep_dive_project SET updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND project_id=#{projectId}
